title: Addiction - Full Documentary (NOVA | PBS)
description: Science-led documentary explaining addiction mechanisms and treatment realities.

title: Real Stories of Addiction and Hope
description: First-person accounts of addiction and recovery; varied perspectives, steady tone.

title: Breaking the Chains of Addiction
description: Northamptonshire recovery stories; honest, community-focused, non-sensational.

title: Jordan's Addiction Recovery Story | BREAK THE CHAIN
description: Long-form personal recovery story; supportive framing and reflection.

title: Helen's Addiction Recovery Story | BREAK THE CHAIN (Full)
description: Long-form personal account; impact on relationships and rebuilding.

title: How Alcohol Took Over My Life: Addiction And Recovery
description: Alcohol-focused lived experience documentary; consequences and change process.

title: THROUGH A BLUE LENS | Full Documentary (NFB)
description: Stark street-level documentary; mature subject matter (use discretion in detox).

title: Opioids, Inc. | FRONTLINE (PBS/FT)
description: Investigative documentary on an opioid company's practices and system failures.

title: Chasing Heroin | FRONTLINE (PBS)
description: Public-health framing of the opioid/heroin crisis and what helps recovery.

title: Overdosed | The Hidden Opioid Crisis | Full Documentary
description: Rural community impact of opioid crisis; personal and systemic angles.

title: BREAKING POINTS | Partnership to End Addiction
description: Youth stress and coping; prevention-oriented framing.

title: American Epidemic: The Nation's Struggle With Opioid Addiction (WSJ)
description: WSJ documentary on opioid addiction impact and families' experiences.
